---
title-block: false
description: "Contact links for Lewis Kwon."
---

# Contact

::: {.contact-panel}
::: {.contact-row}
**Email**  
[lewis.kwon@kdis.ac.kr](mailto:lewis.kwon@kdis.ac.kr)
:::

::: {.contact-row}
**LinkedIn**  
[linkedin.com/in/lewiskwon](https://linkedin.com/in/lewiskwon)
:::

::: {.contact-row}
**ORCID**  
[0000-0002-0113-0179](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0113-0179)
:::

::: {.contact-row}
**Google Scholar**  
[Scholar profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=6VV6TF4AAAAJ&hl=ko)
:::
:::
